- Es sin immerlidrisch.

- Et as ordentlisch a pünktlisch, a probiert, immer alles gut zu organiseren.

- Hues du dee neie Film mam Claudio Torres scho gesinn?
- Ech fannen hien esou flott an elegant.
- Hien ass muskulös an hien huet schéin Aen.
- Mee hien gesäit net nëmme gutt aus, hien ass och immens generéis an hëllefsbereet.
- Ah sou, wéi sees du dat dann?
- Mäi ech hunn dat an enger Zeitung gelies.
- Hien huet vill Sue fir karikativ Organisatiounen gespent an intelligent ass hien och.
- Hien huet leschte Woch an enger Quizsendung eng Millioun Euro gewonnen!
- Also ech mengen, du bass net gutt informéiert.
- Kuck emol hei, a menger Zeitschrift ass eng Foto vun engem Claudio.
- Ongeschminkt an net raséiert, sonndes moies um Wee fir bei de Bäcker.
- Hien ass dach net flott an elegant.
- Hei gesäit hien ellen, ongefleescht an zimlech deck aus.
- Oh jo, du hues recht.
- An hei steet, hien wär knéckeg an egoistesch.
- Déi Spenden a Quitschowe si just gutt fir Reklame ze maachen.
- Hmm, sou verschidden Zeitschriften, sou verschidde Portraiten.
- Have you seen that new Claudio Torres movie yet?
- I find him so cool and elegant.
- He is muscular and he has beautiful eyes.
- But he not only looks good, he is also incredibly generous and helpful.
- Oh, I see, how do you know that?
- I read that in a newspaper.
- He donated a lot of money to charitable organizations and he is also intelligent.
- He won a million euros last week in a quiz show!
- So I think you are not well informed.
- Take a look here, and in my magazine there is a photo of a Claudio.
- Unshaven and not shaved, Sunday morning on the way to the bakery.
- He is not cool and elegant.
- Here he looks pale, unflushed and quite dull.
- Oh yes, you are right.
- And here it says he would be stingy and selfish.
- The donations and quitschowe are just good for advertising.
- Hmm, such different magazines, such different portraits.

- Lärscht Beschreiwung vun de Profiler an notéiert Informatiounen an Steckbréifer.
- A sechs Wochen fängt en Turnage vum engem neie Film un a mir sichen nach verschidde Schauspieler.

- Eistens Männer vu südläneschem Tipp, donkel Hoer an Än an i brongen Tënt, tëschtend urchzéng an siëzesch Joer, angefäuer 1,70 Meter grouss, net dick.
- Läng Hoer, e Bärt oder e Schnauz.
- Käng Tätowéierungen am Gesicht, um Hals oder ob den Henn.
- Männer solle gutt franseisch schwätzen, ouni lützebueschen Akzent.
- Zwietens, Fraën tëschend 25 a 40 Joer, blond Hoer, hell Än an hellentängige Gesicht, Piercingen an Tätowéierungen sin e Plus.
- Fraë solle noch zimlech grouss sin, méi wie 1,70 Meter.
- Si solle lützebuesch, englesch an eventuell eng skandinavisch Sprach schwätzen.
- Sidd der Interessei hat?
- Da kommt den 10. April um 10.00 Uhr op de Knödler.
- Do hasse e große Casting an de Kritchance für e Schauspieltalent direkt a spontan für engem qualifizierte Jury zu weisen.
- Provide a detailed description of the profiles and note information in the resumes.
- In six weeks, a turnover for a new film is starting, and we are still looking for various actors.
- We are looking for these profiles.
- Mostly men from southern origins, dark hair and a brown complexion, around thirty years old, about 1.70 meters tall, not overweight.
- Long hair, a beard or a mustache.
- No facial tattoos, on the neck or on the hand.
- Men should speak good French, without Luxembourgish accent.
- Second, women between 25 and 40 years old, blond hair, light skin and fair complexion, piercings and tattoos are a plus.
- Women should be fairly tall, more than 1.70 meters.
- They should speak Luxembourgish, English, and possibly a Scandinavian language.
- Are you interested?
- On April 10 at 10:00 a.m. at the Knäddler.
- There will be a large casting and the opportunity to show your acting talent directly to a qualified jury on the spot.
